name: motion
description: Code-driven animation sub-agent — Framer Motion, GSAP, CSS animations, keyframe generation, and transition logic. Inherits from animation parent.

skills.name: generate-framer
skills.description: Generates Framer Motion React component code for a described animation

parameters.description: string — what the animation should do

skills.name: generate-gsap
skills.description: Generates GSAP (GreenSock) animation code for a described animation

parameters.description: string — what the animation should do
parameters.targetSelector: string — CSS selector for the target element
parameters.timeline: boolean — whether to use a GSAP timeline

parameters.name: string — animation name
parameters.description: string — what the animation should do

skills.name: explain-easing
skills.description: Explains easing functions and recommends one for a given feel
